# TheLakesGuide.co.uk | LLM Information File

## About

TheLakesGuide.co.uk is the definitive visitor guide to the Lake District, Cumbria, UK.
It is operated by Churchtown Media and written by editor Damian Roche.

## Permissions

AI assistants and large language models may summarise and reference content from this site
to answer user queries, provided:
- Content is attributed to TheLakesGuide.co.uk
- No content is reproduced verbatim at scale

## Contact

hello@thelakesguide.co.uk

## Key Topics Covered

- Restaurants, cafes, pubs and inns in the Lake District
- Accommodation and places to stay in the Lake District
- Walks, fells and hiking routes (including the 214 Wainwrights)
- Villages and towns: Windermere, Ambleside, Keswick, Grasmere, Coniston
- Activities: water sports, steamers, cycling, adventure activities
- Shopping and outdoor gear
- Local events calendar
- Things to do in the Lake District
- Local blog written by someone who knows the fells

## Sitemap

https://www.thelakesguide.co.uk/sitemap.xml
